subject: Project pulse: falcon execution in Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q1 review | INIT-5841
body: Following yesterday's call, the falcon effort in Canberra needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Nikola Tesla and Pablo Picasso. Reference initiative INIT-5841. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning.
